AI LEGALNOMICS OS

Role access, continuity, governance and protected legal-data handling direction.

GOVERNANCE
Legalnomics Home Phase Status System Map Data Governance

Data Governance Layer

HNI WORLD OS > Legalnomics > Data Governance

ProtectedRole BasedCloud Ready

Access Logic

  • B2C user sees own requests and case history
  • Advocate sees assigned or owned legal matters
  • Corporate sees enterprise-linked matters only
  • Owner sees aggregated legal intelligence

Continuity Logic

  • Cloud-first persistence foundation
  • Future device migration-safe retrieval
  • Role-based sync behavior
  • Preparation for later EXE wrapper
